response.justification: The candidate brings roughly 20 years of broad engineering experience and recent exposure to agentic AI tooling, but the AI depth is nascent — limited to roughly one year of MCP framework work beginning in April 2025 — with no recognized AI products or platforms at scale. The role demands a director-level IC with demonstrated AI strategy leadership and a track record of advising strategic customers; the candidate's career has remained at the senior/staff individual-contributor level throughout, with no evidence of that strategic or advisory reach.
strengths: ~20 years of engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput distributed systems
Hands-on AI-agent and MCP framework work at re:cinq, showing current engagement with agentic workflows
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective, including public talks and open-source community building
concerns: AI expertise is shallow and recent — roughly one year, no shipped AI products or platforms at meaningful scale
No director-level or strategic leadership history; career arc is senior/staff IC with no evidence of advising enterprise customers or shaping organizational AI strategy
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and no industry recognition as an AI expert
